title: S&D Trader: Can BingX AI Claw actually replace manual charts?
author: thienpro2
selftext:
After years of manually trading using the Supply & Demand method (4H, 1D timeframe), monitoring the market 24/7 is becoming exhausting. I just signed up for the BingX AI Claw beta to see if their "proprietary AI algorithms" can really handle this heavy workload.

I'm particularly interested in the "Cross-Verified Signals" feature. If it can filter out high-potential trading setups across a wide range of assets even when I'm offline, that would be a breakthrough. 

Has anyone here had early access yet?

comments.author: Sufficient_Fuel5269
comments.body: It’s great... I really liked this feature✍️🌐📊

comments.author: Creative-Elephant-37
comments.body:
I feel you—monitoring higher timeframes nonstop gets draining fast.

If AI Claw can actually deliver on those cross-verified signals and filter quality setups while you’re offline, that’s a huge edge.

Haven’t had early access yet, but definitely curious to see how it performs in real market conditions.

replies.author: thienpro2
replies.body: Spot on. The 'offline edge' is exactly what I'm looking for. Monitoring charts 24/7 is the fastest way to burnout. If this can maintain quality while we're away, it’s a massive win.

comments.author: HelloGoodbye2894
comments.body: I'm curious how this BingX AI Claw would work with analyzing multiple markets. I can't wait to try !

replies.author: thienpro2
replies.body: Manually tracking multiple markets is a headache. If the AI can actually aggregate all that data without losing accuracy, it'll be huge

comments.author: gabotM
comments.body: I'm also waiting for access. Monitoring the market 24/7 using Supply & Demand drains anyone, so hopefully this AI Claw delivers on those cross-verified signals. Let us know if you notice the filtered setups are actually solid.

replies.author: thienpro2
replies.body: Totally feel you. HTF S&D analysis is a mental marathon. I'm really hoping those cross-verified signals can act as a solid first filter so we can focus on the best setups. Will definitely update the sub once I'm in!

comments.author: Any-Progress-9902
comments.body: Estoy registrado y expectante a probar esta propuesta de bingx, me parece muy interesante!

replies.author: thienpro2
replies.body: ¡Estamos en las mismas! Estoy muy curioso por ver cómo se comporta esta IA en condiciones reales de mercado. ¡Ojalá nos den acceso pronto!

comments.author: bjxxjj
comments.body: ngl I tried the beta for a bit and the signals felt kinda noisy, especially on higher TF S&D stuff. nice for alerts when you’re offline, but I still ended up checking charts manually before trusting any entry.

replies.author: thienpro2
replies.body: Appreciate the honest feedback! Honestly, as an S&D trader, I’d probably still do a final manual check too-'trust but verify,' right? But if it can at least alert us to the zones, that's half the battle won.

comments.author: chicadepanem
comments.body: Esta función va a ser increíble evitando largas horas de investigación

replies.author: thienpro2
replies.body: Evitar esas largas horas de investigación manual sería un gran alivio para todos

comments.author: epicskyes
comments.body: You can filter your own setups with massive .com some python a discord server and telegram

replies.author: thienpro2
replies.body: That's a powerful DIY setup if you have the coding skills

replies.author: epicskyes
replies.body: Took me a day with codex. Built a local host web gui to go with it

comments.author: flashamazin
comments.body: It’s great... I really like this already
